title: Ceiling Baffles Sound Acoustic Dampeners
brand_hint: Acoustic-felt ceiling baffles (multiple Canadian suppliers possible)

specs.dimensions: Multiple sizes from 8"x47.5" up to 16"x95.5" (per BBI catalog)
specs.materials: Acoustic felt or high-density fiberglass (e.g. 6 lb/ft³) on anodized aluminum supports
finishes_available: Multiple felt colours typical for category
key_features: Suspended ceiling baffle for sound absorption (echo / reverberation reduction)
Absorbs sound from both surfaces (vs. wall panel which absorbs one side)
Available in standard sizes from 8"x47.5" to 16"x95.5"
specs.notes: BBI list price ~$152. Companion product to cached `ceiling-grids-sound-acoustic-dampeners-1`. Specific manufacturer not identifiable from web — likely a small Canadian acoustic supplier (TheQuietRoom, Hush Acoustics, EzoBord, Acoustic Panels Canada, Décosoft, or Frasch).
